text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of a long and arduous
journey in the Twinkle Series for me and my
trainee. Her name is...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm Nishino Flower. Nice to meet you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I know I still have a long ways to go, but my goal
is to be an inspiration to others.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Which means I first need to be someone people
can depend on. So if there's anything I can do to
help, please call on me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begin my days challenging the Twinkle
Series with <chrname>!
